name: No-Bread Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 3 large hard cooked eggs, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the egg salad filling.
- Refrigerate for at least 1 hour to blend the flavors.
2. Spread 4 of the cheese slices with the filling.
3. Place tomato slices on top of the filling.
4. Top with lettuce leaves and season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Cover with the remaining cheese slices.
6. Serve on individual plates with pickles and olives.
